---
applyTo: "**/*"
---

# Handoff Instructions

Before you start:
1. Read `progress.md` section `Latest Handoff Snapshot`.
2. Confirm current phase in `task_plan.md`.
3. Check confirmed facts/open questions in `findings.md`.

Before you stop:
1. Update `progress.md` snapshot with files changed and open TODO.
2. Add new findings into `findings.md` if any.
3. Add the next first command that can be executed directly.
<!-- RELAY:END -->
